---
title: "Alias Test Session"
subtitle: "SE01"
toc: false
---

## Overview

Testing alias resolution for interactions.







{{< include _sections/01-alias-test-page.qmd >}}





## Summary
*Session summary placeholder*

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Alias Resolution Test</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="test-alias-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Alias Verification</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
